body.title: Implement confidence-gated palace writes for Librarian
body.result: PalaceWriter class with 3-tier confidence gate, human-authored protection, CC inbox escalation
body.description:
Librarian palace writes currently have no confidence threshold — any synthesis can overwrite any node. This ticket implements the inertia-tier confidence gate so freedom of thought is unconstrained but freedom of permanent record is earned.

Three tiers matching palace inertia:
- LOW: any write with at least one sourced retrieval (URL, DB query, direct observation). Write proceeds with provenance tag.
- MEDIUM: requires 2+ independent sources with no contradiction found. Trusted-principal attribution counts as multiplier (see T-librarian-trust-hierarchy-config).
- HIGH: requires 5+ corroborations plus human-approval gate — same escalation path as pe_chain HIGH inertia. Posts to CC inbox for Akien approval before write.

Each palace write from Librarian must carry: confidence_score (float 0.0–0.999…), provenance_chain (list of source descriptors), certification_timestamp, inertia_tier.

Human-authored nodes (clan.memory_palace.updated_by != 'librarian' and != 'dreaming'): Librarian may NOT silently overwrite. Attempt fires CC inbox escalation with proposed content for human review.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/ — new palace_writer.py or extended research.py (MEDIUM inertia)
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/coding (OOP-first; confidence gate as a class); theigors/rules/database (Postgres only, clan.memory_palace); no new memory types
**Scope boundary:** In scope: confidence gate logic + provenance tagging + human-authored-node protection + CC inbox escalation for HIGH tier. Out of scope: Librarian cognitive architecture changes; changes to how trust multipliers are stored (T-librarian-trust-hierarchy-config).
**Test plan:** Write with 1 source → LOW tier write succeeds, provenance tag present. Write with 0 sources → rejected. Attempt overwrite of human-authored node → CC inbox escalation fires, no write made. HIGH tier attempt → escalation to CC inbox, write pending approval.
